# jamfprotect_telemetries_v2 (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of all v2 telemetry configurations in Jamf Protect.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all v2 telemetry configurations in Jamf Protect.
data "jamfprotect_telemetries_v2" "all" {}

# Output the names of all v2 telemetry configurations.
output "telemetry_v2_names" {
  value = [for t in data.jamfprotect_telemetries_v2.all.telemetries_v2 : t.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `telemetries_v2` (Attributes List) The list of v2 telemetry configurations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--telemetries_v2))

<a id="nestedatt--telemetries_v2"></a>
### Nested Schema for `telemetries_v2`

Read-Only:

- `created` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `description` (String) A description of the telemetry configuration.
- `events` (List of String) Endpoint Security events to monitor.
- `file_hashing` (Boolean) Whether file hashing is enabled.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the telemetry configuration.
- `log_file_collection` (Boolean) Whether log file collection is enabled.
- `log_files` (List of String) Log file paths to collect.
- `name` (String) The name of the telemetry configuration.
- `performance_metrics` (Boolean) Whether performance metrics collection is enabled.
- `updated` (String) The last-updated timestamp.
